title: GTA 6 Ingame Footage Monitor Shot

imagePrompts.prompt: GTA 6 in-game footage, very detailed, very realistic. Close-up shot taken from a stationary 4k monitor. There's a slight blurriness in the image, as it feels like it was taken handheld. A wide, bright environment.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

GTA 6 in-game footage, very detailed, very realistic. Close-up shot taken from a stationary 4k monitor. There's a slight blurriness in the image, as it feels like it was taken handheld. A wide, bright environment.
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

GTA 6 in-game footage, very detailed, very realistic. Close-up shot taken from a stationary 4k monitor. There's a slight blurriness in the image, as it feels like it was taken handheld. A wide, bright environment.
promptTranslations.ru:

imagePrompts.title: Gta 6 Ingame Footage Monitor Shot

prompt: GTA 6 in-game footage, very detailed, very realistic. Close-up shot taken from a stationary 4k monitor. There's a slight blurriness in the image, as it feels like it was taken handheld. A wide, bright environment.
originalPrompt: GTA 6 in-game footage, very detailed, very realistic. Close-up shot taken from a stationary 4k monitor. There's a slight blurriness in the image, as it feels like it was taken handheld. A wide, bright environment.

promptTranslations.zh: GTA 6 游戏内画面，细节丰富，高度写实。从一台 4K 显示器上拍摄的特写镜头。画面带有轻微的模糊感，营造出一种手持拍摄的真实感。背景环境宽阔明亮。
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

GTA 6 in-game footage, very detailed, very realistic. Close-up shot taken from a stationary 4k monitor. There's a slight blurriness in the image, as it feels like it was taken handheld. A wide, bright environment.
promptTranslations.ru: Игровой процесс GTA 6, высокая детализация, максимальный реализм. Крупный план, снятый с 4K-монитора. Легкое размытие, создающее эффект съемки с рук. Широкое, ярко освещенное игровое пространство.
promptTranslations.pt: Gameplay de GTA 6, muito detalhado, muito realista. Close-up tirado de um monitor 4k fixo. Há um leve desfoque na imagem, como se tivesse sido tirada com uma câmera na mão. Um ambiente amplo e iluminado.
promptTranslations.ja: GTA 6のゲーム内映像、非常に精細でリアルな質感。4Kモニターを至近距離から撮影したショット。手持ち撮影のようなわずかなブレ感があり、広々とした明るい環境が映し出されている。
promptTranslations.ko: GTA 6 게임 플레이 화면, 매우 디테일하고 사실적인 묘사. 4K 모니터를 정면에서 근접 촬영한 느낌. 핸드헬드로 촬영한 듯 약간의 블러 효과가 가미됨. 밝고 넓은 배경.
